heading: Entitlement of officers discharged or retired under this chapter to separation pay or retired pay
label: 20263 Entitlement of officers discharged or retired under this chapter to separation pay or retired pay

children.heading: .—Separation Pay
children.label: a .—Separation Pay
children.text: An officer who is discharged under this chapter is entitled, if eligible therefor, to separation pay under .section 1174 of this title

children.heading: .—Retired Pay
children.label: b .—Retired Pay
children.text: An officer who is retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 71 or 1223 of this title, as applicable.
